subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Beloved, and by it hath He illumined hearts. Blessed is he who turneth towards it, and woe betide every heedless one who remaineth remote [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المحبوب و به انار القلوب طوبی لمن اقبل ویل لکل غافل بعید قد سرع
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
